generated_by: Btown Brief research pipeline (Claude Sonnet 5 agent)
sources_pulled: VT DFS Licensing MasterList (data.vermont.gov Socrata API, resource id cy8e-89cz) - Electrician/Plumber/Gas Installer/Oil Installer license holders, filtered to 20 Chittenden County zip codes

VBRA Remodelers Directory (homebuildersvt.com/Remodelers-Directory) - page 1 of 3 (50 of ~110 total statewide members), each member's public profile page scraped for 'Served Counties', filtered to members tagging 'Chittenden'
sources_not_pulled_this_pass: OPR Act 182 Residential Contractor Registry - lookup-only Pega portal, no bulk CSV/API export located; manual 'Profession Roster Download' check still needed (see brief step 2)

Efficiency Vermont Efficiency Excellence Network (EEN) - confirmed the 'Find a Contractor' tool at efficiencyvermont.com/find-contractor-retailer is a client-side JS search widget with hash-fragment routing (#/?provider=pro&service=...) - a direct scrape (even with a 3s render wait) returns the empty search form, not results. Needs firecrawl-interact (fill zip + submit + read results) or a manual per-zip sweep; not attempted this pass.
Google Places API - not called this session per instructions. google_maps_search_url is a constructed '/maps/search/?api=1&query=' link, NOT a verified place_id/listing match.
BBB profile matching - not performed per-row; bbb_profile_url is null for every row this pass.
VBRA Remodelers Directory pages 2-3 (members 51-110) - directory pagination is JS/AJAX-driven with no stable page URLs; only page 1 (50 members) was reachable via plain scrape.
schema_notes: google_maps_search_url is a constructed query URL, not a verified Google Place ID - always confirm against the real business before publishing. VBRA-sourced 'category' is a rough auto-guess from the member's self-reported service tags (first alphabetical match against a keyword map) and needs Steve's manual normalization pass. DFS rows are individual license holders, not businesses - a multi-person firm appears as multiple rows.
